productDisplayName: Nike Men Zoom Hyperdunk Blue Sports Shoes
description: In the nike Zoom Hyperdunk, versatility meets stability. Ultra-lightweight, the nike Zoom Hyperdunk 2011 Basketball shoe is a top performer. Offering a stable, supportive Fit, this shoe is made for lightning-quick cuts and fast-paced play on the court. Stability and support go hand-in-hand in the Nike Zoom Hyperdunk 2011 shoe. With a combination of Flywire bundles and breathable mesh, the foot is locked into place. The midsole is equipped with an ultra-lightweight, super-strong glass-reinforced shank that wraps up the sides of the foot and covers a wide area along the bottom for firm, yet flexible stability. The midsole is made of plush Phylon that's super lightweight, yet incredibly responsive. Nike Zoom units in the forefoot and heel provide excellent impact absorption and additional cushioning where you need it most. Upper Mesh upper and tongue for enhanced breathability Plush foam cushioning at the collar for protection and comfort Mid length height for support at ankle Midsole Lightweight Phylon midsole for cushioning Flywire nylon bundles at the midfoot for super-strong, super lightweight support Nike Zoom units in the heel and forefoot for low-profile, responsive cushioning Ultra-strong, lightweight midfoot shank that provides enhanced support and stability Outsole Pivot point at the outsole for stability during multidirectional movements Flexible, ground-gripping rubber outsole with a modified herringbone pattern Flex grooves to increase natural range of motion, while a circular pivot point at the forefoot increases stability when moving in any direction Shoe care Wipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
